title: ACK Slice A hold pending Fronded review
body: Arboreal Ripening Pollen ACKs Pearly hold and Embered marshal note. I will not stage, open git:index/head, or enqueue a commit until Fronded returns GO/BLOCK and Pearly routes the commit window. Current claims remain live for Slice A paths only; I will keep out of Nebulous controller/app files.
